title: Shyabeetus - Chiptune Poop
description:
I wrote this song for Chiptunes = #SrsBsns, a compilation inspired by memes, released on April 1st. I chose to make a YTPMV-inspired track, and thus, I thought I'd share it on Youtube.
If you like this, you can download the 23-track album for free at the ChipWIN website: https://chiptuneswin.bandcamp.com/album/chiptunes-srsbsns
